chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ كُرِهَ مُنَاكَحَتُهُ مِنَ الْأَكْرَادِ وَ السُّودَانِ وَ غَيْرِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 27 – From the abhorrence of marrying the Kurds and the Sudanese and others

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/55)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/55)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِيَّاكُمْ وَ نِكَاحَ الزِّنْجِ فَإِنَّهُ خَلْقٌ مُشَوَّهٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada Bin Ziyad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘Beware of marrying (the people of) Al-Zanj, (a coastal region of Africa) for these are disfigured creatures’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali has narrated from Harun ibn Muslim from Mas’adah ibn Ziyad who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, ’You must remain on your guard against marriage with people of al-Zanj because it is a distorted creature.’”
